name: FHIR Interoperability Suite
description: Complete FHIR integration toolkit for CMS-0057/HTI-1 compliance.
use_case: Health systems, payers, and health IT vendors building CMS-0057 and HTI-1 compliant FHIR integrations with AI agent access.

mcps.why: Generic FHIR server connector with SMART-on-FHIR auth. The foundational layer.
Natural language interface to FHIR. Reduces FHIR learning curve from weeks to minutes.
Direct EHR connectivity. Built by SMART Health IT pioneer Josh Mandel.
Epic and Cerner specific tools and prompts for EMR data interaction.
Medical imaging metadata from PACS and DICOM-compliant systems.

example_prompts: Connect to the FHIR server and retrieve all Patient resources with diabetes
Search the Provider Directory for cardiologists within 50 miles of Boston
Pull the latest lab results for this patient from Epic
Query DICOM metadata for all chest CT studies from this month
What FHIR resources are available on this HealthLake datastore?
regulatory_references: HTI-1: USCDI v3 with FHIR US Core (January 2026)
